_comment: ClawMux configuration — copy this file to clawmux.json and adjust values.

compression._comment_threshold: Token ratio (0.1–0.95) that triggers context compression.
compression._comment_model: Model ID in 'provider/model' format used for the compression summarisation call.
compression._comment_targetRatio: Desired compression ratio (0.2–0.9). 0.6 = compress to 60% of original.

models._comment_models: Model IDs in 'provider/model' format for each routing tier. Do NOT use provider names starting with 'clawmux-' — this causes infinite loops.

contextWindows._comment_contextWindows: Optional per-model context window overrides (in tokens). Keys use 'provider/model' format.
